content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

February 9, 2004

Harold Ferber, Senior Counsel
Department of Health Services
Office of Legal Services
P.O. Box 942732
Sacramento, CA 94234-7320

Re: Our File No. W-04-015

Dear Mr. Ferber:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission ("FPPC") has withdrawn your January 26, 2004, request for written advice regarding Ms. Caroline Davis, a former county employee on interjurisdictional assignment with the Department of Health Services ("DHS"). You state that since Ms. Davis no longer anticipates meeting with DHS computer experts, you no longer require advice concerning the post-governmental employment provisions of the Political Reform Act¹.

Should you have any other further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Marion Cruz
Legal Intern

MC:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\04-015

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109 – 18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
